title: My Name Is Stilton, Geronimo Stilton
titleZh: 我叫斯蒂顿，杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's loud new 14-year-old assistant Pinky Pick throws his life into chaos — and a North Pole New Year's party changes him forever! 🕶️

q.en: Why does Geronimo hire Pinky Pick as his assistant without interviewing her?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩为什么没有面试就直接雇了平基·皮克当助手？

options.en: He trusted his whiskers and her perfect-looking resume
options.zh: 他相信自己的胡须直觉，也看中她那份出众的简历

explain.en: Geronimo read hundreds of resumes, thought Pinky's stood out, and insisted 'my whiskers never lie' — so he signed the contract without meeting her.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩读了上百份简历，觉得平基的最出色，还坚持“我的胡须从不说谎”，于是没见面就签了合同。

q.en: What is unusual about Pinky Pick's shoes?
q.zh: 平基·皮克的鞋子有什么特别之处？

options.en: Shocking pink platform sneakers with pink plastic fish swimming in the soles
options.zh: 荧光粉的高帮松糕鞋，鞋底里还有粉色塑料小鱼在游动

explain.en: Her enormous high-top sneakers are shocking pink with see-through platform soles; pink plastic fish swim in water inside them, lit by a flashing light.
explain.zh: 她那双巨大的高帮松糕鞋是荧光粉色的，透明厚鞋底里装着会发光、有粉色塑料小鱼游动的水。

q.en: What extremely rare cheese does Pinky research on the computer?
q.zh: 平基用电脑查到的那种极为罕见的奶酪叫什么？

explain.en: Pinky finds Megacheese, made in the village of Little Cheeseville — only seven whole cheeses a year, since it takes 3,000 gallons of milk for one pound.
explain.zh: 平基查到的是“巨型奶酪”，产自小奶酪村——一年只做七整块，因为做一磅就要用三千加仑牛奶。

q.en: How does Pinky get the interview with rock star Fuzzy Fuzzborn, who never gives interviews?
q.zh: 从不接受采访的摇滚明星法齐·法兹伯恩，平基是用什么办法拿到采访的？

options.en: She wrote a fake fan letter saying her mean boss forced her to work
options.zh: 她写了封假粉丝信，说自己有个坏老板逼她拼命干活

options.en: She is his real biggest fan
options.zh: 她是他真正的头号粉丝

explain.en: Pinky wrote Fuzzy a letter claiming she was his biggest fan with a mean boss (Geronimo) making her work day and night — so he agreed out of pity.
explain.zh: 平基给法齐写了封信，谎称自己是他的头号粉丝，还被坏老板（杰罗尼摩）逼着日夜干活——法齐出于同情才答应了采访。

q.en: What magazine for young mice does Pinky suggest the newspaper publish?
q.zh: 平基建议报社办一本面向小老鼠的杂志，叫什么名字？

explain.en: Among her product ideas, Pinky proposes a magazine for young mice called Fully Kids Only, and says she is the right rodent to run it.
explain.zh: 在她的点子里，平基提议办一本给小老鼠看的杂志，名叫《少儿专属》，并说自己最适合来负责。

q.en: Whom does Pinky hire as her own personal assistant?
q.zh: 平基又雇了谁当她自己的私人助理？

explain.en: During Christmas vacation, Pinky introduces Merry Melody, another fourteen-year-old, as 'my new assistant' to speed up the biography.
explain.zh: 圣诞节假期里，平基带来了同样是十四岁的梅丽·梅洛迪，介绍说她是“我的新助理”，好加快写传记的速度。

q.en: What surprise waits for Geronimo when he gets home on his birthday?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩生日那天回到家，等着他的是什么惊喜？

options.en: A big surprise party thrown by Pinky and his family
options.zh: 平基和家人为他举办的热闹生日派对

explain.en: Thinking no one remembered, Geronimo is greeted by about a hundred mice, Thea, Trap, and Benjamin, with a band, a poet, and fireworks.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩以为没人记得，结果家里挤满了约一百只老鼠，还有蒂奥、特拉普和本杰明，现场有乐队、诗人和烟花。

q.en: Who pilots the helicopter that flies the family to the North Pole?
q.zh: 驾驶直升机把一家人送到北极的是谁？

explain.en: Thea is a licensed pilot with her own plane; she flies the helicopter like a pro and lands them on Captain Nelson's icebreaker.
explain.zh: 蒂奥是持证飞行员，还有自己的飞机；她像老手一样驾驶直升机，把他们降落在纳尔逊船长的破冰船上。

q.en: After the ship crashes into an iceberg, where do Geronimo and his family end up?
q.zh: 船撞上冰山后，杰罗尼摩和家人们流落到了哪里？

options.zh: 被困在了那座冰山上面
回到了纳尔逊船长的船上

explain.en: A wave sweeps Geronimo overboard, but Trap pulls him onto the very iceberg that hit the ship; the whole family shelters there overnight.
explain.zh: 一阵浪把杰罗尼摩拍下船，特拉普把他拉上了那座撞船的冰山；全家人就在冰山上过了一夜。

q.en: At the North Pole New Year's party, what do Geronimo and Merry win together?
q.zh: 在北极的新年派对上，杰罗尼摩和梅丽一起赢得了什么？

options.en: The tango dance competition, with a cheddar trophy
options.zh: 探戈舞比赛，赢得一座切达奶酪奖杯

explain.en: When no one asked Merry to dance, Geronimo did; they entered the tango contest and danced eight hours straight to win a cheddar-carved trophy.
explain.zh: 没人请梅丽跳舞，杰罗尼摩便邀了她；他们参加探戈比赛，连续跳了八个小时，赢了一座切达奶酪雕成的奖杯。
